race.comment: REMINISCENCE (3) sat handy and was far too good first-up over 1200m here, winning with ease. This shapes similarly to his last start and the rise in trip won't be an issue. Looks a nice colt on the rise and he can go repeat the dose. MORF (2) disappointed fresh but did come in without a trial. Suspect he's improved drastically from that performance and the inside draw suits here. Should get every chance and Nottle's claim is a big tick for his chances. MIND FIELD (1) returned with a bang at Northam when winning over this trip as the race favourite. Parnham sticks with him today though and it wouldn't surprise to see him sit closer from a better barrier. Can play a leading role. MISS DEFIES ME (5) can improve on the fresh run. LUNA ASCENDING (7) was good late on resumption and is worth keeping safe.
